summary: Slot matching correctness: --at is parsed in a fixed neutral (UTC) frame and slotOpen compares year/month/day/hour/minute as naive wall-clock against Vagaro's business-local slot labels, so a slot matches regardless of the caller's zone; and the HTML-fragment fallback in ExtractSlots now stamps the known query date (and provider when a single one was requested) onto extracted slots so callers require a date match instead of matching a clock label on any day.
reason: --at is documented business-local wall-clock but was compared as an absolute instant; the dateless HTML fallback let book/slotOpen match '10:00 AM' from the wrong day or provider.
